clues.clue: This envious lion brother murders Mufasa to seize Pride Rock.
This sea witch tricks Ariel out of her voice in exchange for legs.
This fashion-obsessed fiend wanted to skin Dalmatian puppies for a coat.
This royal vizier in Agrabah carried a snake-headed staff and a parrot named Iago.
This self-styled 'Mistress of All Evil' cursed Princess Aurora to prick her finger.
This green-haired clown prince of crime is Batman's archenemy.
This Spider-Man foe is a scientist fused with four mechanical tentacle arms.
This bald billionaire businessman is Superman's brilliant nemesis.
This trickster god, Thor's adopted brother, led the Chitauri attack on New York.
The mad titan Thanos sought to gather all six of these reality-warping gems.
This black-helmeted Sith Lord turned out to be Luke Skywalker's father.
This dark lord of Mordor forged the One Ring to rule Middle-earth.
This relentless suited program hunted Neo through the simulated world of the Matrix.
This dark wizard, 'He-Who-Must-Not-Be-Named,' sought immortality via Horcruxes.
This shape-shifting, liquid-metal assassin model was sent to kill John Connor.
This cannibal psychiatrist helped catch Buffalo Bill from behind bars.
This burned dream-stalker wore a bladed glove and haunted Elm Street.
This motel owner, disturbingly devoted to his mother, ran the Bates property.
This 'No Country for Old Men' hitman killed with a captive-bolt cattle gun.
In 'Se7en,' this killer staged murders around the seven deadly sins.
In 'Goldfinger,' the villain schemes to contaminate the U.S. gold reserve at this Kentucky depository.
In 'Despicable Me,' Gru's grand scheme is to steal this entire natural satellite.
In 'Die Hard,' Hans Gruber's real goal is robbing the vault inside this L.A. high-rise.
Dr. Evil unfreezes and demands a ransom of this comically modest 'one ... dollars.'
In 'Avengers: Infinity War,' Thanos snaps his fingers to erase this fraction of all living things.

final.clue: In 'The Dark Knight,' this anarchic, scarred villain repeatedly taunts victims with 'Why so serious?'
